summary: Phase A (Super Admin power tools) — full backend + frontend regression. Backend: 12/12 pytest cases pass covering login activity + audit, Approval Matrix default/override/reset, unknown-role 400, async build_chain consumed by POST /api/approvals, Dropdown CRUD + by-category filter, Departments via crud_router with audit, RBAC (site_engineer 403 on admin writes, 200 on categories/roles reads), audit-log filters, regression on clients CRUD and approval action. Frontend: login OK, ADMINISTRATION sidebar visible only to super_admin (hidden for site_engineer — role verified via /api/auth/me), /app/admin shows 5 tile cards, /app/admin/approval-matrix renders all 6 chains, editing+save persists with source='custom' on reload, reset returns source='default', /app/admin/audit-logs renders 28 rows and the detail dialog opens with before/after JSON, Sessions and Departments pages render and show data. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: approval_engine.build_chain is correctly async and DB-first; backward-compat APPROVAL_CHAINS dict is preserved.
audit._sanitize correctly strips _id, password and password_hash before persistence.
crud_router writes audit rows for create/update/delete and now exposes 'departments' as a module — RBAC limits writes/deletes to super_admin.
Endpoint /api/admin/approval-matrix/roles is intentionally readable by any authenticated user (needed by Matrix editor select options) — matches spec.
Login activity captures ip + user_agent (truncated to 240 chars) — sensible cap.

Minor: admin_router._ip ignores X-Forwarded-For so behind ingress the IP is the pod proxy IP (10.79.x.x is what we see in Sessions). Not blocking but consider trusting X-Forwarded-For for the session monitor.
Minor: PUT /api/admin/dropdowns/{id} accepts arbitrary keys (Dict[str, Any]); consider a Pydantic partial model to prevent typos.
test_credentials: admin@erp.com / Admin@123 (super_admin). Created during test run: test_site_engineer@erp.com / TestPass@123 (site_engineer).
seed_data_creation: Test-prefixed transient data (TEST_cat_*, TEST_dept_*, TEST_client_*) is cleaned up by each test. The site_engineer user remains in db.users (idempotent re-register handled inside fixture).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A admin endpoints + UI are stable. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_phase_a_admin.py runs in ~5s and is safe to re-run as regression. For Phase B (auto-numbering / ENQ-2026-0001) the sequences.py helper is staged but not yet consumed by any route — verify it is wired into the create_item path of the relevant module(s) before testing.
